banner.description: Creative and detail-oriented Full-Stack Web Developer with experience in graphic and motion design. Hands-on experience building responsive applications using React, Node.js, Express, and cloud deployment. Strong focus on clean code, user experience, and engaging interfaces.

skills.title: Skills
skills.description: Solid foundation in data structures, algorithms, and object-oriented programming, combined with strong problem-solving, analytical thinking, collaboration, and continuous learning skills.

projects.title: Projects
projects.description: The following projects showcase my practical experience developing modern web applications, from responsive user interfaces to scalable backend systems.

travel.title: Travel Agency Demo
travel.desc: Frontend travel website built with JavaScript.

event.title: Event Scheduler Demo
event.desc: Web app with API integration built using TypeScript. Allows users to create, manage, and organize events in a simple and user-friendly interface.

journal.title: Travel Journal Demo
journal.desc: Frontend single-page application with authentication and backend API for handling business logic and data.

coffee.title: Coffee Shop Demo
coffee.desc: Semantic website built with HTML and CSS.

diary.title: Personal Diary Demo
diary.desc: Single Page Application built with React and Vite. Users can create, view, and manage diary entries in a clean interface.
